metadata.title: Buttons
metadata.description: Create Buttons in your Obsidian notes to run commands, open links, and insert templates

regex.source: .setText("What type of button are you making?"
.setDesc("What would you like to call this button?"
.setDesc("Select a template note and what should happen"
regex.target: .setDesc("选择一个模板注释以及应该执行的操作"

regex.source: .setDesc("At which line should the template be inserted?"
.setDesc("Should you be prompted to enter a name for the file on creation?"
regex.target: .setDesc("创建时是否应提示您输入文件的名称?"

regex.source: .setDesc("Enter a folder path to place the note in. Defaults to root"
regex.target: .setDesc("输入要放置笔记的文件夹路径。默认为 root"

regex.source: .setDesc("Should the new note open in a split pane?"
regex.target: .setDesc("新注释是否应在拆分窗格中打开?"

regex.source: .setDesc("What should the new note be named?"
.setDesc("choose buttons to be included in the Inline Swap Button"
regex.target: .setDesc("选择要包含在 内联交换 按钮中的按钮"

regex.source: .setDesc("Would you like to remove this button (or other buttons) after clicking?"
regex.target: .setDesc("单击后是否删除此按钮(或其他按钮)?"

regex.source: .setDesc("Would you like to replace lines in the note after clicking?"
regex.target: .setDesc("单击后是否替换注释中的行?"

regex.source: .setDesc("Would you like to inherit args by adding an existing button block-id?"
regex.target: .setDesc("是否要通过添加现有按钮块 id 来继承 args?"

regex.source: .setDesc("inherit from other Buttons by adding their button block-id"
regex.target: .setDesc("通过添加其他按钮的按钮块 id 从其他按钮继承"

regex.source: .setDesc("Do you want to convert a templater command inside your Button on each click?"
regex.target: .setDesc("是否要在每次单击时转换按钮内的模板器命令?"

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a custom class for button styling"
.setDesc("What color would you like your button to be?"
regex.target: .setDesc("你希望你的纽扣是什么颜色?"

regex.source: addOption("command", "Command - run a command prompt command")
addOption("link", "Link - open a url or uri")
regex.target: addOption("link", "链接 - 打开 url 或 uri")

regex.source: addOption("template", "Template - insert or create notes from templates")
regex.target: addOption("template", "模板-插入或从模板创建笔记")

regex.source: addOption("text", "Text - insert or create notes with text")
regex.target: addOption("text", "文本-插入或创建带有文本的笔记")

regex.source: addOption("swap", "Swap - Create a multi-purpose Inline Button from other Buttons")
regex.target: addOption("swap", "多功能-从其他按钮创建多功能内联按钮")
addOption("copy", "复制-将文本复制到剪贴板")

regex.source: .setDesc("What should the new note be named? Note: if prompt is on, this will be the default name"
regex.target: .setDesc("新注释应该命名为什么?注意:如果启用提示,这将是默认名称"

regex.source: .setDesc("What text and where should it go?"
.setDesc("Enter a calculation, you can reference a line number with $LineNumber"
regex.target: .setDesc("输入计算,可以使用 $LineNumber 引用行号"

regex.source: .setDesc("Use true to remove this button, or supply an [array] of button block-ids"
regex.target: .setDesc("使用 true 删除此按钮,或提供按钮块 ID 的[数组]"

regex.source: .setDesc("Supply an array of [startingLine, endingLine] to be replaced"
Notice("Templater is not installed. Please install it.")
Notice(`There was an error processing the template!`, 2000)
Notice("There was an issue prepending content, please try again", 2000)
regex.target: Notice("添加内容前出现问题,请重试", 2000)

regex.source: Notice("There was an issue appending content, please try again", 2000)
regex.target: Notice("追加内容时出现问题,请重试", 2000)

regex.source: Notice("There was an issue adding content, please try again", 2000)
regex.target: Notice("添加内容时出现问题,请重试", 2000)

regex.source: Notice("There was an error! Maybe the file already exists?", 2000)
regex.target: Notice("发生了一个错误!也许文件已经存在？", 2000)

regex.source: Notice("Check the line number in your calculate button", 3000)
regex.target: Notice("检查计算按钮中的行号", 3000)

regex.source: Notice(`Couldn't find the specified template, please check and try again`, 2000)
regex.target: Notice(`找不到指定的模板,请检查并重试`, 2000)

regex.source: Notice("You need to have the Templates or Templater plugin enabled and Template folder defined", 2000)
regex.target: Notice("您需要启用Templates或Templater插件并定义Template文件夹", 2000)

.log("尝试在以下位置创建文件夹：", directoryPath)

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "arrow" element must be an HTMLElement (not an SVGElement).', 'To use an SVG arrow, wrap it in an HTMLElement that will be used as', 'the arrow.'].join(' '))
regex.target: .error(['Popper: "arrow" 元素必须是 HTMLElement(而不是 SVGElement)。', '要使用 SVG 箭头,请将其包裹在一个用作箭头的 HTMLElement 中。'].join(' '))

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "arrow" modifier\'s `element` must be a child of the popper', 'element.'].join(' '))
regex.target: .error(['Popper: "arrow" 修改器的 `element` 必须是 popper 元素的子元素。'].join(' '))

regex.source: .error(['Popper: The `allowedAutoPlacements` option did not allow any', 'placements. Ensure the `placement` option matches the variation', 'of the allowed placements.', 'For example, "auto" cannot be used to allow "bottom-start".', 'Use "auto-start" instead.'].join(' '))
regex.target: .error(['Popper: `allowedAutoPlacements` 选项未允许任何位置。确保 `placement` 选项与允许的位置变体匹配。', '例如,"auto" 不能用于允许 "bottom-start"。', '请改用 "auto-start"。'].join(' '))

regex.source: .error("PopperJS: an invalid property has been provided to the \"" + modifier.name + "\" modifier, valid properties are " + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function (s) {             return "\"" + s + "\"";           }).join(', ') + "; but \"" + key + "\" was provided.")
regex.target: .error("PopperJS: 无效的属性已提供给修改器 \"" + modifier.name + "\",有效属性为 " + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function (s) {             return "\"" + s + "\"";           }).join(', ') + "; 但提供了 \"" + key + "\" 属性。")

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "auto" placements require the "flip" modifier be', 'present and enabled to work.'].join(' '))
regex.target: .error(['Popper: "auto" 位置需要 "flip" 修改器存在且启用才能工作。'].join(' '))

regex.source: 'Popper: modifier "%s" provided an invalid %s property, expected %s but got %s'
regex.target: 'Popper: 修改器 "%s" 提供了一个无效的 %s 属性,期望 %s 但得到 %s'

regex.source: 'Popper: modifier "%s" requires "%s", but "%s" modifier is not available'
regex.target: 'Popper: 修改器 "%s" 需要 "%s",但 "%s" 修改器不可用'

regex.source: 'Popper: Invalid reference or popper argument provided. They must be either a DOM element or virtual element.'
regex.target: 'Popper: 提供的参考或 popper 参数无效。它们必须是 DOM 元素或虚拟元素。'

regex.source: 'Popper: An infinite loop in the modifiers cycle has been detected! The cycle has been interrupted to prevent a browser crash.'
regex.target: 'Popper: 检测到修饰符循环中的无限循环!为了防止浏览器崩溃,已中断循环。'

regex.source:
.warn(['Popper: Detected CSS transitions on at least one of the following', 'CSS properties: "transform", "top", "right", "bottom", "left".', '

', 'Disable the "computeStyles" modifier's `adaptive` option to allow', 'for smooth transitions, or remove these properties from the CSS', 'transition declaration on the popper element if only transitioning', 'opacity or background-color for example.', '

', 'We recommend using the popper element as a wrapper around an inner', 'element that can have any CSS property transitioned for animations.'].join(' '))
regex.target:
.warn(['Popper: 检测到以下至少一个 CSS 属性上有 CSS 过渡：', '"transform", "top", "right", "bottom", "left".', '

', '禁用 "computeStyles" 修改器的 `adaptive` 选项以允许平滑过渡,', '或者如果仅过渡 opacity 或 background-color 等属性,', '请从 popper 元素的 CSS 过渡声明中移除这些属性。', '

', '我们建议使用 popper 元素作为内部元素的包装器,', '该内部元素可以具有任何 CSS 属性的过渡效果以进行动画。'].join(' '))

regex.source: .warn(['Popper: CSS "margin" styles cannot be used to apply padding', 'between the popper and its reference element or boundary.', 'To replicate margin, use the `offset` modifier, as well as', 'the `padding` option in the `preventOverflow` and `flip`', 'modifiers.'].join(' '))
regex.target: .warn(['Popper: CSS "margin" 样式不能用于在 popper 和其参考元素或边界之间添加填充。', '要复制 margin,可以使用 `offset` 修改器,以及', '`preventOverflow` 和 `flip` 修改器中的 `padding` 选项。'].join(' '))
Exception('无法理解 ' + string.slice(i) + ' 之后的内容')

regex.source: Exception(cToken + ' is not allowed after ' + prevKey)
regex.target: Exception(cToken + ' 不允许出现在 ' + prevKey + ' 之后')

regex.source: Exception('Closing parenthesis are more than opening one, wait What!!!')
regex.target: Exception('关闭括号多于开启括号,等等!!!')

regex.source: Exception('Two decimals are not allowed in one number')
regex.target: Exception('一个数字中不允许有两个小数点')
